_help: Key = EXACT English text from Dialogflow (reply, chip, dropdown, any intent). Works for whole bot — not per intent.
_help2: Add one line once. Wherever that English appears, hi/mr will show after user selects language.

Welcome back! What would you like to do?.hi: वापसी पर स्वागत है! आप क्या करना चाहेंगे?

Hello! How can I help you today?.mr: नमस्कार! आज मी तुम्हाला कशी मदत करू शकतो?
